mapper.select: SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
SELECT item_num, code, name FROM item

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num
AND io.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND io.io_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND qc.qc_pass = #{type}
AND ( upper(item.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(item.code) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, lot.lot_num, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE qc.qc_pass = 'WAITING' ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, lot.lot_num, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE io.io_num = #{io_num} ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
